ddls:
CREATE TABLE "stocks" (
  "ticker" TEXT /* Ticker symbol for the stock */,
  "company_name" TEXT /* Full name of the company */,
  "sector" TEXT /* Sector the company operates in */,
  "industry" TEXT /* Industry the company operates in */,
  "market_capitalization" REAL /* Market capitalization of the company */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country where the company is headquartered */,
  "exchange" TEXT /* Stock exchange where the stock is listed */,
  "currency" TEXT /* Currency in which the stock is traded */,
  "ipo_date" TEXT /* Initial public offering (IPO) date of the stock */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Last time the stock metadata was updated */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the stock (e.g., active, delisted) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("ticker")
)

CREATE TABLE "daily_stock_data" (
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the trading data */,
  "open" REAL /* Opening price of the stock */,
  "high" REAL /* Highest price of the stock during the day */,
  "low" REAL /* Lowest price of the stock during the day */,
  "close" REAL /* Closing price of the stock */,
  "adj_close" REAL /* Adjusted closing price of the stock */,
  "volume" INTEGER /* Total trading volume of the stock */,
  "ticker" TEXT /* Ticker symbol of the stock */,
  "pre_market_open" REAL /* Pre-market opening price */,
  "after_hours_close" REAL /* After-hours closing price */,
  "change_percent" REAL /* Percentage change in the stock price */,
  "volume_change_percent" REAL /* Percentage change in trading volume */,
  "source_id" TEXT /* Data source (e.g., API, manual entry) */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Last time the data was updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("date", "ticker")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., analyst, trader, admin) */,
  "access_level" TEXT /* Access level of the user (e.g., read-only, read-write) */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Last login date and time */,
  "last_activity" TEXT /* Last activity date and time */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the user (e.g., active, suspended, deleted) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the user account was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "transactions" (
  "transaction_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each transaction */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who made the transaction */,
  "ticker" TEXT /* Ticker symbol of the stock traded */,
  "transaction_type" TEXT /* Type of transaction (e.g., buy, sell) */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the transaction */,
  "quantity" INTEGER /* Number of shares involved in the transaction */,
  "price" REAL /* Price per share at the time of transaction */,
  "portfolio_id" INTEGER /* ID of the portfolio associated with the transaction */,
  "fee" REAL /* Transaction fee */,
  "tax" REAL /* Tax amount */,
  "source_id" TEXT /* Data source (e.g., API, manual entry) */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the transaction (e.g., pending, completed, failed) */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Last time the transaction was updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("transaction_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_transactions_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_transactions_portfolio_id FOREIGN KEY ("portfolio_id") REFERENCES investment_portfolios ("portfolio_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_transactions_ticker FOREIGN KEY ("ticker") REFERENCES stocks ("ticker")
)

CREATE TABLE "investment_portfolios" (
  "portfolio_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the portfolio */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who owns the portfolio */,
  "portfolio_name" TEXT /* Name assigned to the portfolio by the user */,
  "creation_date" TEXT /* Date when the portfolio was created */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the portfolio */,
  "initial_value" REAL /* Initial value of the portfolio */,
  "current_value" REAL /* Current value of the portfolio */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the portfolio (e.g., active, archived) */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Last time the portfolio was updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("portfolio_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_investment_portfolios_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "alerts" (
  "alert_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each alert */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who set the alert */,
  "ticker" TEXT /* Ticker symbol of the stock to be monitored */,
  "alert_type" TEXT /* Type of alert (e.g., price crossing threshold, volume spike) */,
  "threshold" REAL /* Threshold value for the alert to trigger */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date the alert was created */,
  "frequency" TEXT /* Frequency of alert checks (e.g., daily, weekly) */,
  "notification_method" TEXT /* Notification method (e.g., email, SMS) */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the alert (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  "last_triggered" TEXT /* Last date and time the alert was triggered */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Last time the alert was updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("alert_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_alerts_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "market_indices" (
  "index_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the market index */,
  "index_name" TEXT /* Name of the market index (e.g., S&P 500, NASDAQ) */,
  "ticker" TEXT /* Ticker symbol for the index */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country where the index is based */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the index */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the index (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Last time the index data was updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("index_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "historical_market_data" (
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the market data */,
  "open" REAL /* Opening value of the index */,
  "high" REAL /* Highest value of the index during the day */,
  "low" REAL /* Lowest value of the index during the day */,
  "close" REAL /* Closing value of the index */,
  "adj_close" REAL /* Adjusted closing value of the index */,
  "volume" INTEGER /* Total trading volume of the index */,
  "index_id" INTEGER /* ID of the market index associated */,
  "pre_market_open" REAL /* Pre-market opening value */,
  "after_hours_close" REAL /* After-hours closing value */,
  "change_percent" REAL /* Percentage change in the index value */,
  "volume_change_percent" REAL /* Percentage change in trading volume */,
  "source_id" TEXT /* Data source (e.g., API, manual entry) */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Last time the data was updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("date", "index_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the report */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who generated the report */,
  "title" TEXT /* Title of the report */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date the report was generated */,
  "content" TEXT /* Content of the report */,
  "type" TEXT /* Type of report (e.g., performance, strategy) */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the report (e.g., draft, published) */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Last time the report was updated */,
  "source_id" TEXT /* Data source (e.g., API, manual entry) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reports_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
